case_title: CARL RICHARD ZIMMER VS. ZEHAFTA YOHANNES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIMMER, CARL RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOHANNES, ZEHAFTA $3,124.90 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,214.90, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $3124.90 PLUS COSTS. PLAINTIFF WAS ON SURREY ST APPROACHING THE INTERSECTION; DEFENDANT WAS REQUIRED TO YIELD TO HIM ON THE NARROW STREET AS SHE CROSSED DIAMOND AND DID NOT. DEFENDANT IS AT FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARK:MS. AIDA TECLE (DAUGHTER OF ZEHARTA YOHANNES), CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AND ACCEPTED THE DOCUMENTS ON BEHALF OF HER MOTHER. SERVED JUL-19-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOHANNES, ZEHAFTA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED OCT-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOHANNES, ZEHAFTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN PLAINTIFF CARL RICHARD ZIMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZEHAFTA YOHANNES IS PRESENT ASSISTED WITH TIGRINYA INTERPRETATION BY IDA TECLE A NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. THE TIGRINYA INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURT CLERK R.SAHAJIAN. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,148.85 FILED BY ZIMMER, CARL RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT YOHANNES, ZEHAFTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CARL ZIMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
